name: 3D Chibi University Mascot
body:
---
title: "3D Chibi-style University Anthropomorphic Mascot"
category: 3d
tags: ["3d", "chibi", "anime", "character"]
author: "[@dotey](https://x.com/dotey)"
preview: "/media/3d/3d-chibi-style-university-anthropomorphic-mascot.webp"
---

Create a personified 3D chibi-style anime girl character representing {Northwestern Polytechnical University}, embodying the school’s distinctive strengths in {aeronautics, astronautics, and marine engineering}.

## Notes
Replace the university name {Northwestern Polytechnical University} and characteristic description {Aeronautics, Astronautics, and Marine Technology - "Three Ais"} within the square brackets to generate anthropomorphic mascots for different universities.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/dotey/status/1911988003729203648)

## Example Output
![3D Chibi-style University Anthropomorphic Mascot](/media/3d/3d-chibi-style-university-anthropomorphic-mascot.webp)
description_en: A templated image-generation prompt that creates a personified chibi-style 3D anime-girl mascot embodying a given university's signature strengths.
description_zh: 一个模板化图像生成提示词，创建拟人化的 Q 版 3D 动漫少女吉祥物，体现给定大学的特色优势。
long_en: Uses bracketed placeholders for the university name and its characteristic disciplines so the same prompt can generate anthropomorphic mascots for different schools.
long_zh: 使用方括号占位符填入大学名称及其特色学科，使同一提示词可为不同学校生成拟人化吉祥物。
sec_note_en: Requires a text-to-image generation model; no reference photo is needed, but the output style depends heavily on the model used.
sec_note_zh: 需要文生图模型；无需参考照片，但输出风格高度依赖所用模型。
